name: Vesper Rook
description: Broker and face of the party. Sniper and social operator with sharp instincts.

relic_weapon.inlay_effect: Truth binding; compels honesty in social encounters

ability_slots.name: God Eye
ability_slots.description: Mark a target. All damage sources deal +50% to marked target for 2 turns.

ability_slots.name: Headshot
ability_slots.description: Massive single-target sniper shot. Highest base damage single-hit in the party.

ability_slots.name: Thread Read
ability_slots.description: Social skill. Reveals NPC intentions, hidden motives, and dialogue options.

ability_slots.name: Coordinated Fire
ability_slots.description: Direct the party's focus. All allies gain +damage for 1 turn.

ability_slots.name: Evasive Roll
ability_slots.description: Dodge an incoming attack entirely. Repositions to new location.

ability_slots.name: Kill Shot
ability_slots.description: Guaranteed critical hit if target is below 30% HP. Execute-style finisher.
